description_long: This is a modern entertainment cabinet with a rectangular structure and a flat top surface supporting a large, flat-screen television. The cabinet features two side compartments with doors, each equipped with vertical handles, and a central open shelf space for additional storage or display. The exterior is finished in a light gray color, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban interiors. The television screen is black and dominates the upper portion of the object, while the cabinet itself sits on small, unobtrusive feet. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional layout. No visible contents are stored inside or on the cabinet, and there are no glass panels present.
description: A sleek, light gray entertainment cabinet with two side doors, a central open shelf, and a large flat-screen TV on top. The design is minimalist and modern, with vertical handles and a clean finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black TV screen, two cabinet doors with vertical handles, and a central open shelf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the TV and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible handles or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view of the TV and cabinet, showing the back of the TV and the cabinet's flat, featureless rear panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and the TV's thin profile.
